productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Red Chuck Taylor All Star Canvas Shoes
description: Red round toed shoes with a canvas upper with stitch detailing for shoe structure Central lacing system with a long tongue for comfort, rubber overlay on the toe box to protect the toe region Reinforced overlay at the heel region for good shoe structure Metal eyelets on the midfoot for ventilation PU midsole with branding on the heel and PU foxing on the toe region Rubber outsole with terraced grooves and patterned lugs
